title: Rabbit's Immersive Horror Modpack
description: A collection of horror mods compiled by RabbitGlue5 for a server!
body:
**An astonishingly terrifying experience - a REIMAGINED version of the previous vanilla+/horror modpack, now on forge instead!**

I strongly suggest anyone to at least try this modpack because it offers a difference ambience to horror that some other modpacks don't. Also, the performance is fairly better than others, but it may require "pre-gening" using the mod "chunky" in order to rub out any lag spikes occuring due to terrain generation. Look up a tutorial, or the mod on Modrinth, if unfamiliar with the commands.

NOTE: The latest version of the modpack which is on forge is the reimagined, and currently best version of the modpack. The other versions listed before (the ones set to "alpha" are the previous, original modpack versions, and are still listed in the order of how updated they are based off of date.
